product_overview: This product is a FastAPI-based AI assistance backend for citizen services, combining chat, voice, OCR, scheme guidance, status checks, and human helper workflows. It supports text and voice interactions, multi-agent orchestration, and supporting utilities for document discovery and service access.
core_goals: Provide reliable AI-assisted citizen support through text and voice interfaces
Enable scheme eligibility, application guidance, and application status checking
Support document processing and document preparation guidance
Offer human helper (Jan Sahayak) registration, verification, and appointment workflows
Expose operational health and discovery endpoints for service monitoring and client integration

features.name: Health & Root
features.description: Provides basic service metadata and liveness checks so clients and operators can verify the backend is running.
user_flows: GET / with no authentication -> Receive 200 with service metadata including root information
GET /health with no authentication -> Receive 200 with health status indicating service is alive
GET /health when the service is unavailable -> Receive a non-200 error or no response, indicating a failed liveness check

features.name: Chat API
features.description: Enables authenticated text chat with the AI assistant, including synchronous responses, streaming responses, subsystem health, and session cleanup.
user_flows: POST /chat/ with valid authenticated credentials and a message -> Receive 200 with a chat response
POST /chat/stream with valid authenticated credentials and a message -> Receive 200 with streamed tokens
POST /chat/ with missing or invalid authentication -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
DELETE /chat/session/{session_id} for an existing session -> Receive confirmation that the session is cleared
DELETE /chat/session/{session_id} for a non-existent session -> Receive an error response indicating the session was not found

features.name: Orchestrator
features.description: Routes citizen queries through a LangGraph multi-agent workflow to produce a coordinated AI response.
user_flows: POST /orchestrator/chat with valid authenticated credentials and a citizen message -> Receive 200 with an orchestrated agent response
POST /orchestrator/chat with missing or invalid authentication -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /orchestrator/chat when an upstream agent or model dependency fails -> Receive an error response indicating orchestration could not complete

features.name: Eligibility Agent
features.description: Supports scheme eligibility conversations, checklist retrieval, session tracking, and session cleanup for eligibility assessment.
user_flows: POST /agent/start with valid authenticated credentials -> Receive confirmation that an eligibility session has started
POST /agent/answer with valid authenticated credentials and a prior question context -> Receive the next eligibility question or assessment result
GET /agent/checklist with no authentication -> Receive 200 with the scheme checklist
GET /agent/session/{session_id} for an active session -> Receive 200 with session status details
DELETE /agent/session/{session_id} for an active session -> Receive confirmation that the eligibility session was cleared
POST /agent/answer without a valid session or required context -> Receive an error response indicating the answer could not be processed

features.name: Application Guide
features.description: Provides step-by-step guidance for scheme applications and a list of supported schemes.
user_flows: GET /apply/guide with no authentication -> Receive 200 with a step-by-step application guide
GET /apply/schemes with no authentication -> Receive 200 with the list of supported schemes
GET /apply/guide when guidance data is unavailable -> Receive an error response indicating the guide could not be loaded

features.name: Status Tracker
features.description: Allows authenticated users to check application status for supported schemes and discover which schemes are supported for status lookup.
user_flows: GET /status/status/schemes with no authentication -> Receive 200 with the list of schemes supported for status checks
POST /status/status/check with valid authenticated credentials and application details -> Receive 200 with the application status result
POST /status/status/check with missing authentication -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /status/status/check with unsupported scheme details -> Receive an error response indicating the scheme is not supported for status checks

features.name: Help & Discovery
features.description: Helps citizens locate nearby CSC centers and understand required documents for applications.
user_flows: GET /help/csc/nearby with no authentication -> Receive 200 with nearby CSC center information
GET /help/doc/guide with no authentication -> Receive 200 with document preparation guidance
GET /help/doc/list with no authentication -> Receive 200 with the list of supported documents
GET /help/csc/nearby with invalid or incomplete location data -> Receive an error response or empty results indicating no matching CSC centers were found

features.name: OCR
features.description: Processes uploaded document images or PDFs and extracts fields from Aadhaar or income certificate documents with MIME-type validation.
user_flows: POST /ocr/scan with a valid authenticated image or PDF document -> Receive 200 with extracted fields
POST /ocr/scan with an unsupported file type -> Receive 400 Invalid file type
POST /ocr/scan with missing authentication -> Receive an authorization error
POST /ocr/scan with a corrupted or unreadable document -> Receive an error response indicating OCR extraction failed

features.name: Voice
features.description: Supports voice-based interactions including model discovery, transcription, voice-to-scheme queries, voice conversations, and TTS testing.
user_flows: GET /voice/models with no authentication -> Receive 200 with the list of available voice models
POST /voice/transcribe with valid authenticated audio -> Receive 200 with the transcription from Sarvam Saaras v3
POST /voice/query with valid authenticated audio or voice input -> Receive 200 with scheme discovery results
POST /voice/conversation/start with no authentication -> Receive 200 with a new voice conversation session
POST /voice/conversation/chat with conversation input -> Receive 200 with a one-shot voice chat response
POST /voice/conversation/answer with a conversation turn and context -> Receive 200 with the next voice answer
GET /voice/conversation/test-tts with no authentication -> Receive 200 with TTS output test data
POST /voice/transcribe with invalid or unsupported audio format -> Receive an error response indicating transcription failed

features.name: Jan Sahayak
features.description: Manages human helper registration, login, listing, dashboard access, admin verification, appointment requests, token-based responses, and appointment status lookup.
user_flows: POST /sahayak/register with helper profile details -> Receive confirmation that the helper was registered
POST /sahayak/helper/login with valid helper credentials -> Receive helper login success and access details
GET /sahayak/helpers with no authentication -> Receive 200 with the list of registered helpers
GET /sahayak/helper/dashboard/{helper_db_id} for a valid helper ID -> Receive 200 with helper dashboard details
POST /sahayak/admin/verify/{helper_db_id} for a helper awaiting verification -> Receive confirmation that the helper was verified
POST /sahayak/appointments/request with appointment details -> Receive confirmation and an appointment identifier
GET /sahayak/appointments/respond/{token} with a valid appointment token -> Receive 200 with the appointment response result
GET /sahayak/appointments/status/{appointment_id} for an existing appointment -> Receive 200 with appointment status details
POST /sahayak/register with missing or invalid helper details -> Receive an error response indicating registration failed
POST /sahayak/helper/login with invalid credentials -> Receive an authentication failure response
POST /sahayak/appointments/request with malformed or incomplete data -> Receive an error response indicating the appointment request was rejected

known_limitations.issue: Several state-changing endpoints (Jan Sahayak register/login/appointments) are unauthenticated
known_limitations.impact: Potential for abuse without rate limiting or auth

known_limitations.issue: Endpoints depend on external services (MongoDB Atlas, Gemini, Sarvam) which may fail in local/test env
known_limitations.impact: Some tests may surface 5xx if secrets/services are unavailable locally
